mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.research_id, p.title, p.author_role, p.journal_name, p.published_year FROM student_publication p INNER JOIN student_research_experience r ON r.id = p.research_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE p FROM student_publication p INNER JOIN student_research_experience r ON r.id = p.research_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_publication(research_id, title, author_role, journal_name, published_year) VALUES(#{researchId}, #{title}, #{authorRole}, #{journalName}, #{publishedYear})
